_comment: Third-party code vendored as COPIED SOURCE (not a package manager), so Dependabot cannot see or update it. The .github/workflows/vendored-deps.yml job checks each 'repo' latest release against 'version' weekly and opens a tracking issue when behind. To update: replace the file(s) at 'path' from upstream, then bump 'version' here. steam_api_minimal.h is a hand-authored minimal subset of the Steamworks SDK headers and is intentionally NOT tracked here.

deps.name: stb_truetype
deps.note: Single-header TrueType rasterizer used ONLY by the dev tool tools/mxbmrp3_fontgen to rasterize .ttf into PiBoSo .fnt atlases — not compiled into the shipped plugin. stb has no release tags; version is the header's own 'v' comment.

deps.name: miniz
deps.note: The MZ_VERSION macro in the header reads 11.3.2 (internal ABI version); upstream release tags are 3.x. miniz_export.h is a hand-authored static-linking stub (empty MINIZ_EXPORT), not upstream's CMake-generated header, so it is intentionally left untouched across bumps.
